results.rendered_html:
1. tārya (part. fut. pass. von 1. tar)
1〉 transeundus, zu passiren: nadī  R. 3,30,40 . nāvā tāryam  P. 4,4,91 . nautāryāṃ tāṃ nadīṃ taret  MBH. 12,12460 .  AK. 1,2,3,10 .
— 2〉 zu überwinden, zu besiegen: kurubalābdhim — atāryasattvam  BHĀG. P. 1,15,14 .

tārya a. [tṝ karmaṇi ṇyat]
1 To be crossed, passable.
2 To be conquered or defeated.
— ryaṃ Fare, freight, toll.
